about.quote: True knowledge is not merely information; it is transformation. When wisdom enters the heart, it changes not only how we think but how we live. The path to enlightenment begins with understanding our true divine nature.

hero.title: Swami Ji Journey
hero.subtitle: Guiding souls toward enlightenment and inner peace

temple.title: About Our Temple
temple.paragraph1: Located in the sacred city of Haridwar, Harihar Ashram is a spiritual sanctuary established under the divine guidance of Swami Avdheshanand Giri Ji Maharaj. Surrounded by the serene banks of the Ganga, the ashram is a center for peace, meditation, and spiritual upliftment. It serves as a beacon of the timeless values of Sanatan Dharma, rooted in India’s ancient Vedic traditions.
temple.paragraph2: The ashram is dedicated to imparting the eternal wisdom of the Vedas, Upanishads, and Gita through satsangs, discourses, and yoga practices. Swami Ji’s powerful teachings combine spiritual depth with practical life guidance, helping seekers attain inner harmony, strength, and clarity in their journey of self-realization.
temple.paragraph3: Harihar Ashram welcomes all individuals regardless of background, belief, or nationality. It is a place where seekers gather to reflect, grow, and connect with the divine. The ashram continues to inspire thousands to live with compassion, discipline, and a deeper connection to the spiritual essence of life.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.paragraph1: Under the divine guidance of Param Pujya Swami Avdheshanand Giri Ji Maharaj, our mission is to provide a sacred space for spiritual evolution — where the eternal wisdom of the Vedas and Sanatan Dharma is harmonized with the realities of modern life. We aim to guide seekers on the path of self-realization, inner peace, and righteous living.
mission.paragraph2: We are dedicated to building a spiritually uplifting community that embraces compassion, understanding, and selfless service, while honoring each individual's unique spiritual journey as envisioned by Swami Ji's teachings and life example.

foundation.title: Foundation
foundation.description: Our temple was established by Swami Avdeshanand Giri with just 12 disciples.

ashram.title: First Ashram
ashram.description: Opened our first residential ashram for intensive spiritual practice.

global.description: Began international programs and retreats across five continents.

host.title: Podcast Host & Spiritual Guide
host.bio1: Swami Avdheshanand Giri is a renowned spiritual leader whose teachings blend ancient wisdom with practical modern guidance. With over 30 years of spiritual practice, he offers profound insights into meditation, mindfulness, and the path to self-realization.
host.bio2: Through this podcast, he shares transformative spiritual knowledge accessible to seekers at all stages of their journey, helping listeners find peace amidst the challenges of contemporary life.

journey.sectionDescription: Today, the mission of Swami Avdheshanand Giri has touched the lives of millions of individuals. Through his direct contact with people and through various channels, he continues to bring clarity to all.

books.description: Books on life topics and scriptures

glimpses.sectionTitle: Glimpses from Swami Avdheshanand Giri ji Sessions and Interactions

paragraph1.beforeHighlight: Delve into the profound moments captured from  Swami Avdheshanand Giri ji Live

glimpses.paragraph2: Additionally, explore a vibrant collection of images from  Swami Avdheshanand Giri ji insightful interviews and podcasts with renowned personalities and top media houses. The gallery also showcases moments from his engaging talks and lectures delivered at prestigious institutions like IITs, IIMs, IISC, and many more.

institutionalTalks.paragraph1: Swami Avdheshanand Giri ji loves interacting with the dynamic and vibrant youth, and has a profound faith in their ability to effectuate significant changes.
institutionalTalks.paragraph2: He delivers regular talks at illustrious educational institutes, including prestigious organizations such as IITs and IIMs.
institutionalTalks.paragraph3: With over 200+ college appearances and interactions with thousands of enthusiastic students,  Swami Avdheshanand Giri ji has left an indelible impression.

printMedia.title: Print Media
printMedia.description: The mission and teachings of Swami Avdheshanand Giri are regularly and widely covered by national and international media.

videoSeries.introText: To a roaring spirit yearning for freedom and joy,  Swami Avdheshanand Giri ji discourses come as a solace.

paragraph1.beforeHighlight: Thousands of hours of sessions on various scriptures and life topics (in the light of Vedanta) have been compiled and structured in the form of

videoSeries.paragraph2: These video series are aimed at liberating the troubled mind from the shackles of ignorance and suffering.
videoSeries.quote: "Begin from where you are, and what you are."

hero.title: Join Our Volunteer Team

intro.title: Volunteer With Us
intro.paragraph1: Volunteering with Swami Avdheshanand Giri's mission is a unique opportunity to contribute to spiritual and humanitarian causes while growing personally. Our volunteers are the backbone of our initiatives, bringing love, dedication, and service to every project.
intro.paragraph2: Whether you can offer a few hours weekly or join us for special events, your time and talents can make a meaningful difference. Join our community of like-minded souls dedicated to spreading spiritual wisdom and serving humanity.

hero.title: Support Our Mission
hero.subtitle: Join us in preserving and spreading ancient spiritual wisdom

whySupport.title: Why Support Our Mission
whySupport.paragraph1: Have you benefited from swami Avdheshanand Giri's teachings? Do you want swami Avdheshanand Giri's voice to reach millions and billions of individuals? Do you wish to see that the goal to which swami Avdheshanand Giri has dedicated his life is realized?
whySupport.paragraph2: He is fighting this battle for you, it is you who benefits from his hard work, only through your contribution will this mission move forward.

preserve.title: Preserve Wisdom
preserve.description: Help us maintain and protect ancient spiritual knowledge for future generations.

community.title: Grow Our Community
community.description: Support programs that bring spiritual seekers together in learning and practice.

outreach.title: Global Outreach
outreach.description: Expand our reach to share spiritual teachings with audiences worldwide.

transform.title: Transform Lives
transform.description: Enable life-changing spiritual experiences for seekers on their journey.

saveDharma.title: Save Dharma
saveDharma.paragraph1: Swami Avdeshanand Giri is fighting an intense battle to preserve and promote our ancient spiritual traditions. By supporting his mission, you become a crucial part of this effort to protect and spread dharmic knowledge.
saveDharma.paragraph2: Your contribution is not merely financial support—it is your active participation in this sacred mission. It is through your generosity that these teachings can continue to illuminate the path for countless seekers.

fundraising.sectionDescription: Your generous contribution helps us meet these critical needs that sustain and advance our spiritual mission. Each donation directly supports one of these essential areas of our work.

errors.fetchFailed: Failed to load fundraising campaigns. Using sample data instead.

fundraising.noCampaigns: No active fundraising campaigns at the moment.

workspace.title: For Foundation's Workplace
workspace.description: Today, there are more than 200 full-time members across all departments of the organization. Therefore, people are often surprised to learn that even after reaching millions of people in the country, the organization still does not own an inch of land! Yes! Not even an inch. So far, all the work has been carried out in rented offices at various locations.
workspace.additionalText: From the beginning, the organization has always dedicated 80% of its resources to outreach work. As a result, we have reached every corner of the country at a rapid pace, but we have never been able to establish an office for the organization's work. The lack of such an office is a major obstacle to the pace of Acharya ji's mission. Without it, the journey ahead will be extremely difficult.

mission.title: To spread the Mission
mission.description: Acharya Prashant's voice has reached a staggering 53 crore listeners on social media platforms combined! But let's face the harsh truth: 99.9% of you are content just to watch his videos and a mere 0.1% are actually stepping up to support this vital mission. We cannot continue to thrive on empty views while the real work goes unfunded.
mission.additionalText: This month, we're on a mission to raise Rs. 1 Crore, and your contribution can make it possible. Picture the impact—spreading profound teachings far and wide through online channels, touching lives, and fostering enlightenment.

books.title: AP Books Publishing
books.description: By donating to the Books Publishing Department, you help us bring these books to those who need them the most and contribute to the welfare of humanity.
bulletPoints: Digital Marketing - this is quite expensive but also significantly useful to make people aware about these books
Translating books - Gujarati, Tamil, Telugu, Marathi, Bengali, etc.
Hiring professionals to produce high quality books - professional proofreaders, translators, typesetters, graphic designers, digital marketing experts, etc.
Books Scholarships - paperbacks are sent for free at the homes of people who are unable to buy books because of financial constraints.

defaultCampaign.title: Support Our Mission
defaultCampaign.description: Your contribution helps us meet critical needs that sustain and advance our spiritual mission. Each donation directly supports essential areas of our work.

supportingSection.title: Supporting Our Spiritual Mission
supportingSection.paragraph1: Your donation directly supports Swami Avdheshanand Giri Ji's mission to preserve and propagate India's spiritual heritage. In an age of distraction and material excess, this mission has become more critical than ever.
supportingSection.paragraph2: With your support, we can continue to provide spiritual guidance, organize meaningful community events, and maintain sacred spaces that serve as beacons of wisdom and peace in today's chaotic world.
supportingSection.impactParagraph1: Every donation, regardless of size, helps strengthen our foundation and extends our reach. Your generosity enables us to conduct spiritual discourses, support educational initiatives for underprivileged children, and organize community service programs that benefit thousands.
supportingSection.impactParagraph2: By supporting this mission, you become part of a larger movement dedicated to spiritual awakening and social harmony based on timeless wisdom and compassionate action.
supportingSection.quote: "When we give with pure intention, the act of giving itself becomes a spiritual practice."

foreignDonation.title: For Foreign Donors
foreignDonation.message: Thank you for your interest in supporting our mission. To make a donation as a foreign citizen, please proceed to our dedicated international donation portal.

notFound.pathCannotBeFound: The Path You Seek Cannot Be Found
notFound.enlightenmentMessage: Like a traveler in search of enlightenment, sometimes we must find a new path when the one we seek is not available. Let us guide you back to your journey.
notFound.quote: "When you find yourself lost, remember that every path, even those that lead to error, can be a teacher. The journey itself is the destination."

terms.title: Mantra Diksha Terms & Conditions

sacred.title: 1. Sacred Commitment:
sacred.content: Mantra Diksha is a sacred spiritual initiation that requires sincere devotion and commitment to the spiritual path.

inPerson.title: 2. In-Person Requirement:
inPerson.content: Diksha is only offered in person during designated ceremonies. Online or remote diksha is not available.

preparation.title: 3. Preparation:
preparation.content: Candidates should maintain purity of body, mind, and spirit before receiving diksha. This includes following dharmic principles.

confidentiality.title: 4. Confidentiality:
confidentiality.content: The mantra received during diksha is sacred and should not be shared with others without proper guidance.

practice.title: 5. Regular Practice:
practice.content: Recipients commit to regular chanting and following the spiritual guidelines provided by the Guru.

respect.title: 6. Respect & Devotion:
respect.content: Maintain respect towards the Guru, the tradition, and fellow devotees at all times.

noGuarantee.title: 7. No Guarantee:
noGuarantee.content: Registration does not guarantee diksha. Final approval is at the discretion of the spiritual authority.

dataUsage.title: 8. Data Usage:
dataUsage.content: Personal information will be used only for spiritual guidance and communication purposes.

terms.acceptance: I have read, understood, and agree to abide by the Terms & Conditions for Mantra Diksha. I understand this is a sacred commitment and will approach it with proper devotion and respect.

buttons.mustAccept: You must accept the terms and conditions before submitting your registration
